name: 10 MG Escitalopram Tablets IP
about: 10 MG Escitalopram Tablets IP is a general medicine that helps in treating depression and anxiety disorders. These tablets come in a physical form of tablets and are packed in a dry and cool place. The medicine is originated from India and comes with a dosage of 10 mg, which can be taken as per the doctors suggestion. Each box of the medicine contains 20x10 tablets that can be used for a long time. This medicine helps in balancing the chemicals in the brain that are responsible for causing anxiety and depression.
